name: Workflow
summary: Multi-step process orchestration without URL changes — wizard-like flows with per-step validation, linear/branching progression, and state persistence. The non-route complement to Router's URL-based step navigation.

traits.name: withLinearProgression
traits.description: Steps must be completed in order; future steps are disabled until current passes validation

traits.name: withNonLinearProgression
traits.description: Steps can be visited in any order; all validated on final submit

traits.name: withBranchingLogic
traits.description: Step sequence adapts dynamically based on user input (progressive wizard)

traits.name: withGateValidation
traits.description: Validates current step fields via Constraint Validation API before allowing advancement

traits.name: withAutoSave
traits.description: Persists step data to sessionStorage/localStorage on each step change

traits.name: withReviewStep
traits.description: Final step displays summary of all collected data for confirmation

constraintValidation.pattern: checkValidity(), reportValidity(), setCustomValidity() for per-step field validation
constraintValidation.adoption: withGateValidation calls checkValidity() on the active step's fieldset before allowing advancement; hidden steps are automatically skipped by the browser

fieldset.pattern: <fieldset> + <legend> for semantic grouping; disabling a fieldset disables all children
fieldset.adoption: Each step is a <fieldset>; inactive steps get disabled attribute to prevent interaction and exclude from form validation

ariaCurrent.pattern: aria-current='step' marks the active step in a numbered indicator
ariaCurrent.adoption: Step indicator (progress rail) uses <ol> with aria-current='step' on the active <li>

invokerCommands.adoption: Next/Previous buttons use commandfor targeting the workflow element with command='--workflow-next' and command='--workflow-prev'

cssScrollSnap.pattern: CSS Scroll Snap for step transitions; scrollsnapchange event for JS hooks
cssScrollSnap.adoption: Optional trait: withSnapTransitions uses scroll-snap-type: x mandatory for horizontal step animation

dialog.pattern: <dialog> for modal wizard flows with native focus trapping
dialog.adoption: When workflow is rendered inside a <dialog>, focus management delegates to the browser's dialog focusing steps

events.name: workflow-step-before-change
events.description: Fired before step transition. Cancel to prevent advancement (e.g., failed validation).

events.name: workflow-step-change
events.description: Fired after step transition completes. Step content is now visible.

events.name: workflow-complete
events.description: Fired when user completes the final step. Cancel to prevent submission (e.g., final validation).

events.name: workflow-error
events.description: Fired when step validation fails. Provides the invalid fields and error messages.

angularCdkStepper.notes: Most complete headless stepper; linear mode with per-step FormGroup validation

muiStepper.notes: Display-only component; state management and validation are external

patternflyWizard.notes: Most fully specified wizard pattern; progressive wizard adds steps based on user input

stepperize.notes: Emerging standard for headless multi-step; ~1kB, framework-agnostic

reactHookForm.notes: Per-step trigger() enables field-level validation without full form submission

nonRouteWorkflow.description: Steps are state-based, not URL-based. No URL changes during step navigation.
nonRouteWorkflow.rationale: Router already handles URL-based multi-step flows. Workflow covers the complementary case: modal wizards, in-page flows, and short processes where URL bookmarking is unnecessary.

domPresence.description: All steps remain in DOM (behavior pattern). Inactive steps are hidden via View's exclusive group + disabled fieldset.
domPresence.rationale: State preservation across step navigation. Users expect form data to survive forward/back navigation. Consistent with Tabs pattern.

fieldsetPerStep.description: Each step wraps its content in a <fieldset> element. Inactive steps have disabled attribute.
fieldsetPerStep.rationale: Disabled fieldset prevents interaction with hidden step fields and automatically excludes them from form validation. Semantic grouping via <legend> for screen readers.

exclusiveGroupVisibility.description: Steps use View's name-based exclusive group. Showing a step auto-hides siblings.
exclusiveGroupVisibility.rationale: Reuses ViewEngine's proven exclusive group mechanism. Same pattern as Tabs panels and HTML <details name='...'>.

gateValidation.description: Per-step validation before advancement (gate model). Uses native Constraint Validation API.
gateValidation.rationale: Prevents invalid data from accumulating. Immediate feedback is the consensus best practice for complex flows (NN/G, PatternFly, Angular CDK).

invokerNavigation.description: Next/Previous buttons use Invoker Commands: commandfor + command='--workflow-next'/'--workflow-prev'.
invokerNavigation.rationale: Declarative navigation without JS event listeners. Consistent with platform direction (Invoker Commands Baseline 2026).

progressiveWizard.description: withBranchingLogic supports dynamic step lists that grow/shrink based on user input.
progressiveWizard.rationale: Many real-world workflows have conditional steps (e.g., 'Do you have dependents?' → show dependent steps). PatternFly's progressive wizard pattern addresses this.
